author: doll-agent
content:
Added new graph.rs module with:
- GraphMode enum (Connectivity | Distance) mirroring sklearn's mode parameter.
- Free fns kneighbors_graph(x, n_neighbors, mode) and radius_neighbors_graph(x, radius, mode) that build a transient NearestNeighbors / RadiusNeighborsClassifier index over x and return a CsrMatrix<F> from ferrolearn-sparse.
- sort_graph_by_row_values(graph) — round-trips through dense and emits a per-row column-sorted CSR.
- kneighbors_graph methods on FittedNearestNeighbors / FittedKNeighborsClassifier / FittedKNeighborsRegressor.
- radius_neighbors_graph methods on FittedNearestNeighbors / FittedRadiusNeighborsClassifier / FittedRadiusNeighborsRegressor.
Added ferrolearn-sparse as a workspace dependency of ferrolearn-neighbors. Public types re-exported at the crate root. Validated by api_proof_graph_free_functions and per-estimator api_proof tests.
